response.body_raw: <html><title>500: Internal Server Error</title><body>500: Internal Server Error</body></html>

notes: Malformed JSON returns 500 with bare HTML body, NOT a JSON envelope.
Note absence of Strict-Transport-Security header on this 500 response — it's set on success responses but not on this Tornado-default 500.
Our new server can either match this exactly (Tornado-style HTML 500) or improve to a JSON envelope; M1 must decide and document.
